text: Attorney Tricia S. Lindsay submitted memoranda containing fabricated citations and, belatedly, attributed them to LexisNexis's AI-driven features. The court rejected that attribution as "devoid of any specifics" and found only that Lindsay had used "an AI program that generated the fabricated citations." The court imposed a $2,500 Rule 11 sanction.
ai_system_name: Unspecified generative-AI program (court finding; LexisNexis attribution not credited)
canonical_source_conflicted: Non-existent federal cases cited in memoranda of law; Fed. R. Civ. P. 11
mitigation_gap: Counsel submitted AI-generated citations without verification and offered a speculative, uncredited tool attribution after the fact.
reliance_or_harm: $2,500 Rule 11 monetary sanction; fabricated citations submitted in federal court.
